title: oplismenus benthamii
intro: Oplismenus benthamii, also known as bent grass or bent grass weed, is a perennial grass species native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, and are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oplismenus benthamii include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Oplismenus benthamii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat gastrointestinal disorders and skin conditions.
